steps.title: Identify what the passage emphasizes
steps.content: The passage opens with “Women like Grace Murray Hopper made important early contributions” to cryptology and explains how their work “helped make it possible for more women...to enter the field.” The passage's core message is that women have been and are contributors to cryptology—from historical pioneers to today's practitioners.

steps.title: Apply the emphasis to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B asserts that women such as Hopper and Pailen have contributed to cryptology, matching the passage's opening claim. The other three either propose an unsupported reform (A), mistake a side definition for the main point (C), or invent details (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
